command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Check customers table for any golf club or Tewantin customer
SELECT externalId, name, siteAddress FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%Golf%' OR name LIKE '%Tewantin%' OR siteAddress LIKE '%Tewantin%' OR siteAddress LIKE '%Cooroy%';
